steps.title: Find the hose rate
steps.content:
The hose puts $88x$ ounces in $5y$ minutes, so the rate in ounces per minute is
$$\frac{88x}{5y}$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Multiply the rate by the new time, $9y$ minutes, and cancel the $y$ factors because the same variable appears in the time unit.
$$\frac{88x}{5y}\cdot9y=\frac{88x\cdot9}{5}=\frac{792x}{5}$$
The answer is D.
